name: Instantiate HeadyAutoContext singleton at boot
desc: Ensure getAutoContext() is called once in engine-wiring.js with workspaceRoot and exposed as global.__autoContext for all services

name: Wire AutoContext into InferenceGateway
desc: Call wireGateway(gateway, autoContext) so ALL gateway.complete() calls are auto-enriched with workspace context before LLM invocation

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFullPipeline CONTEXT_ASSEMBLE stage
desc: In hc-full-pipeline.js stage CONTEXT_ASSEMBLE, call autoContext.enrich(task, {domain:'battle'}) to inject live workspace context into pipeline context block

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFullPipeline NODE_SELECT stage
desc: Before node selection, enrich task with autoContext focusing on node capability files and service topology

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFullPipeline BATTLE_DISPATCH stage
desc: Call autoContext.enrichForBattle(task) before battle dispatch so all competing models receive workspace-grounded context

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFullPipeline MC_SAMPLE stage
desc: Call autoContext.enrichForMonteCarlo(scenario) to give Monte Carlo simulations real workspace risk signals

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFullPipeline QUALITY_GATE stage
desc: Enrich quality gate evaluations with context about what patterns define quality for this workspace

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFullPipeline PATTERN_CAPTURE stage
desc: After pattern capture, index new patterns into AutoContext vector memory for future context retrieval

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyBattle rounds
desc: In buddy-core.js battle logic, call autoContext.enrichForBattle(prompt, config) before EVERY battle round to ground competitors in workspace state

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyCouncil deliberations
desc: In council orchestration, call autoContext.enrichForCouncil(task, opts) before each model deliberation to provide council-aware context

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyBuddy chat handler
desc: Before every HeadyBuddy user query, call autoContext.enrich(query, {domain:'battle', vectorSearch:true}) to ground buddy in current workspace

name: Wire AutoContext into auto-success react() method
desc: At start of every AutoSuccessEngine.react(), call autoContext.enrich(trigger) to enrich the reaction context and store enriched insights in taskResult

name: Wire AutoContext into HCFPEventBridge autonomous trigger
desc: When bridge fires pipeline:trigger, pre-enrich the trigger payload with autoContext.enrich('autonomous pipeline cycle') for richer pipeline seeding

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyConductor task dispatch
desc: In heady-conductor.js dispatch(), enrich task payloads with autoContext before routing to bees

name: Wire AutoContext into LLM router model selection
desc: Before selecting LLM model in llm-router.js, call autoContext.enrich(query, {domain:'code'}) to enable workspace-aware model routing decisions

name: Index all 99+ YAML config files into AutoContext
desc: Call autoContext.indexWorkspace() at boot to seed vector memory with all YAML configs, service specs, and architecture docs

name: Index HCFullPipeline stage definitions into AutoContext
desc: Serialize all 21 pipeline stage configs and ingest into AutoContext vector memory as 'pipeline_stage' context sources

name: Index bee registry into AutoContext vector memory
desc: Serialize all bee worker definitions from registry.js and ingest into autoContext for bee-capability-aware context

name: Index heady-registry.json into AutoContext
desc: Parse heady-registry.json and index all 175 service entries into AutoContext vector memory for service-aware enrichment

name: Index architecture docs into AutoContext
desc: Index MASTER_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md, UNIMPLEMENTED_SERVICES_AUDIT.md, alive-software-architecture.md into AutoContext for architecture-aware enrichment

name: Validate AutoContext background indexer is running
desc: Check autoContext.getStats() to confirm alwaysOn=true, indexerInterval active, and fileIndexSize > 0

name: Monitor AutoContext enrichment latency
desc: Track autoContext.getStats().avgEnrichTimeMs — alert if enrichment >100ms since it blocks LLM calls

name: Monitor AutoContext cache hit rate
desc: Check cacheHits vs cacheMisses ratio — should be >80% for hot files in steady state

name: Monitor AutoContext vector search quality
desc: Track vectorSearches count and verify vectorHits per enrichment are growing with indexWorkspace()

name: Monitor AutoContext token injection volume
desc: Track totalTokensInjected to ensure AutoContext is actively enriching — 0 means wiring failed

name: Persist AutoContext vectors on pipeline completion
desc: On pipeline:completed event, call autoContext._persistVectors() to save vector memory to autocontext-vectors.jsonl

name: Reload AutoContext vector index on code changes
desc: Wire autoContext.invalidate() to git post-commit hooks so index stays fresh after code changes

name: Validate AutoContext enrich() returns non-empty systemContext
desc: Run a test enrich() call with a known task — verify systemContext contains PROJECT CONFIGURATION section

name: Validate AutoContext vector memory has >= 100 entries
desc: After indexWorkspace(), check autoContext.getStats().vectorMemoryStats.size >= 100 to confirm indexing succeeded

name: Validate AutoContext CSL gates are filtering correctly
desc: Confirm gated sources (relevance >= 0.382) are passing and irrelevant files are excluded from context

name: Wire AutoContext into self-awareness telemetry
desc: In self-awareness.js, enrich all scanDomain() results with autoContext to correlate domain health with workspace state

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyScientist scan
desc: Before HeadyScientist runs integrity protocol, enrich its task with autoContext for workspace-aware analysis

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyQA endpoint probes
desc: Enrich HeadyQA test generation with autoContext.enrich('endpoint test', {domain:'code'}) for API-aware test plans

name: Wire AutoContext into projection engine
desc: Before projecting to Cloud Run/Cloudflare, enrich projection context with autoContext to include deployment-relevant workspace state

name: Wire AutoContext into story driver event ingestion
desc: When storyDriver.ingestSystemEvent() is called, enrich the event with autoContext for narrative-quality improvement

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyMaid maintenance operations
desc: Before heady-maid runs cleanup, call autoContext.enrich('system maintenance') to identify high-priority maintenance targets

name: Wire AutoContext into pattern engine analysis
desc: When patternEngine analyzes observations, provide autoContext enrichment to correlate patterns with code state

name: Wire AutoContext into self-critique engine
desc: Before selfCritique.recordCritique(), enrich the critique context with autoContext for architecture-aware suggestions

name: Wire AutoContext into edge-AI diffusion pipeline
desc: Before generating images/creative output, call autoContext.enrich(prompt, {domain:'research'}) for brand-consistent generation

name: Optimize AutoContext token budget for pipeline stages
desc: Profile token injection per stage and tune focusFiles to reduce context size while maintaining relevance quality

name: Add HCFullPipeline stage names to AutoContext domain mapping
desc: Extend _gatherDomainContext() with 'pipeline' domain mapping to src/orchestration/ for pipeline-stage-aware enrichment

name: Add CSL and sacred-geometry files to AutoContext CONFIG_FILES set
desc: Add csl-engine configs, sacred-geometry-sdk, and phi constants to AutoContext CONFIG_FILES for high-relevance inclusion

name: Add heady-registry.json to AutoContext CONFIG_FILES set
desc: Mark heady-registry.json as a CONFIG_FILES entry (relevance=0.9) so it's always included in context for service-aware AI calls

name: Wire AutoContext emit events to eventBus
desc: Forward autoContext 'context:enriched' and 'context:indexed' events to global.eventBus so other services can react to context updates

name: Create AutoContext API endpoint in heady-manager
desc: Add GET /api/autocontext/stats and POST /api/autocontext/enrich endpoints to heady-manager.js for external context queries

name: Wire AutoContext into beam-of-thought orchestration
desc: In multi-step reasoning chains, inject autoContext at each thought step to maintain workspace grounding throughout chains

name: Wire AutoContext into ARENA stage with real LLM calls
desc: Replace fake ARENA scores with real LLM competition — use autoContext.enrichForBattle() to give each competitor equal workspace context

name: Wire AutoContext into heap watchdog
desc: When heap pressure is detected, call autoContext.invalidate() to clear cache and reduce memory footprint

name: Add AutoContext prior-build patterns to pipeline learning
desc: After each successful pipeline run, store stage timings and outcomes as prior-build patterns in AutoContext _patternsDir

name: Wire AutoContext into HeadyOS kernel scheduler
desc: Before HeadyOS schedules a bee task, enrich the task spec with autoContext for workspace-aware bee assignment

name: Validate AutoContext singleton pattern across all modules
desc: Confirm all modules call getAutoContext() not new HeadyAutoContext() — singleton ensures consistent index across the system

name: Wire AutoContext into budget tracker LLM cost analysis
desc: When budget-tracker records token costs, tag with autoContext source IDs to correlate cost with context injection

name: Wire AutoContext into cross-domain federated search
desc: When building search queries across domains, use autoContext.enrich(query) to expand queries with workspace-relevant terms

name: Wire AutoContext into hallucination watchdog
desc: Before watchdog checks LLM output, fetch relevant context via autoContext.enrich(output) to compare against known workspace facts

name: Generate AutoContext health report in auto-success history
desc: On each react() cycle, capture autoContext.getStats() snapshot and emit as auto-success health telemetry event
